intro.para1: SeaZen is a light-filled beachfront penthouse in the old center of Sitges - one of Barcelona's most beloved coastal towns. Perched above the walking promenade with magnificent sea views, every detail has been considered for those who appreciate quality, peace of mind & dolce farniente.
intro.para2: Whether you're seeking a romantic escape, a family retreat, or a creative recharge, SeaZen offers the perfect hideaway to experience the best of the Catalan coast.

floorplan.heading: 112 m² of refined space
floorplan.desc: One bedroom, open-plan living, fully equipped kitchen & a sea-facing shade terrace with premium lounging furniture.

sitges.heading: Sitges awaits
sitges.subtitle: Step outside and discover one of the Mediterranean's most vibrant and charming towns.

items.title: Beaches
items.desc: 17 golden sandy beaches within walking distance

items.title: Seafood & Tapas
items.desc: Plenty of cosy restaurants & bars along the promenade & in the Old Town

items.title: Art & Culture
items.desc: Museums, galleries, the famous Carnival & Film Festival

items.title: Hiking
items.desc: Scenic trails through Garraf Natural Park

items.title: Barcelona
items.desc: 35 min by direct train to the city centre

booking.heading: Reserve SeaZen
booking.desc: Select your dates below to check availability and book instantly. No commissions nor charge until confirmed.

newsletter.sub: Be the first to hear about availability and special offers.

hero.subtitle: Sitges (Barcelona) - seafront luxury penthouse
hero.subtext: A private penthouse with uninterrupted sea views, where every day is a Sunday

items.name: Sophie & James
items.text: An absolutely stunning apartment. The sea views are breathtaking and the space is beautifully designed. We didn't want to leave. Sitges itself is magical — we'll definitely be back.

items.name: Marie-Claire D.
items.text: Perfect in every way. The apartment is exactly as shown — even better in person. Spotlessly clean, incredibly comfortable, and the location on the seafront is unbeatable. Highly recommend.
